changeSet.author: Kasovich Pavel
changeSet.sql: UPDATE users SET intern_profile_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE role = 'INTERN' AND intern_profile_status IS NULL;
UPDATE intern_hiring_decisions SET decision = 'RECOMMENDED_FOR_HIRE' WHERE decision = 'HIRE'; UPDATE intern_hiring_decisions SET decision = 'COMPLETED_WITHOUT_HIRE' WHERE decision = 'REJECT';
